message:
fix(freeze): fix native loop hang with nested if-statements

Fixed multiple issues causing infinite loops when generating native code
for loops with inner if-statements (like Zod validation patterns):

1. function_returned flag incorrectly set inside if-bodies
   - Only set function_returned when if_body_depth == 0
   - Prevents blocking subsequent loop body blocks

2. block_terminated causing premature body_blocks loop exit
   - Changed to only break on function_returned
   - Reset block_terminated for next block iteration

3. if_false to exit_block emitting break in body blocks
   - Only emit loop break when in header block (loop condition)
   - Inner if-statements now correctly emit if-statement structure

4. Deferred blocks emitted inside nested if-statements
   - Check if any remaining ifs still target the deferred block
   - Only emit when ALL ifs targeting it are closed

Also added pub to g_return_slot_lo/hi exports in js_value.zig.
